code.description: The code of the timeOffReason to represent an external identifier. This field must be unique within the team in Microsoft Teams and uses an alphanumeric format, with a maximum of 100 characters.

displayName.description: The name of the timeOffReason. Required.

iconType.description: Supported icon types are: none, car, calendar, running, plane, firstAid, doctor, notWorking, clock, juryDuty, globe, cup, phone, weather, umbrella, piggyBank, dog, cake, trafficCone, pin, sunny. Required.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the timeOffReason can be used when creating new entities or updating existing ones. Required.
